message:
chore: regenerate conformance / CVE-arena / release fixtures for the new ABI surface

Refresh all auto-generated reports to reflect the recent landed work:
- the libbsd-parity / GLIBC_PRIVATE / NSS / NIS / xdr porting commits (bd-d5f7u, bd-jb7p1, bd-cz5v6, bd-p3eqw, bd-2poiz, bd-2vvx3, bd-bxgwb, bd-ukuxr, bd-fsknj, bd-x65q3, bd-kapb7, bd-ubjtz, bd-yz9cj, bd-rzecx) which raised the classified surface from 3996 → 4109 symbols
- the host-symbol resolution refactor (raw ELF lookup + startup-readiness guards) which changed several runtime-policy-aware code paths the conformance pipeline observes

Counts:
- total_exported: 3996 → 4109 (+113)
- implemented: 3592 → 3699 (+107)
- raw_syscall: 404 → 410 (+6)
- wraps_host_libc / glibc_call_through / stub: still 0

Files:

* README.md, FEATURE_PARITY.md — every "3996/3592/404" mention updated to "4109/3699/410", including the support_matrix excerpt and the FAQ ("Does it already implement a lot of symbols natively?") to match the new reality.

* support_matrix.json — `total_exported` bumped, taxonomy counts refreshed, new symbol rows for the 113 newly-classified entries appended in deterministic-sort order.

* tests/conformance/*.json — all generated reports regenerated:
  - reality_report.v1.json — top-level counts updated
  - per_symbol_fixture_tests.v1.json (~2.5K-line diff), fixture_pipeline.v1.json (~6.9K-line diff) — per-symbol coverage rows added for the new exports
  - symbol_universe_normalization.v1.json, symbol_tiers_roadmap.v1.json, symbol_fixture_coverage.v1.json, symbol_latency_baseline.v1.json — universe-level snapshots with new rows
  - posix_obligation_matrix.v1.json — POSIX surface re-enumerated against the wider classified set
  - support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json — drift counts re-derived from the new support_matrix.json
  - feature_parity_*, claim_reconciliation_report, callthrough_census, closure_sweep_report, conformance_coverage_snapshot, cross_report_consistency, errno_edge_report, fixture_unit_tests, fuzz_*, hard_parts_truth_table, packaging_spec, perf_*, replacement_levels, reverse_round_contracts, stub_*, workload_api_wave_plan — refreshed with the new surface counts

* tests/cve_arena/results/** — re-run artifacts for every checked-in CVE arena scenario (bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35, bd-1qy, bd-24b6, bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd) plus the cross-cutting validation reports (corpus_normalization, format_string_validation, hardened_assertions, heap_overflow_validation, integer_overflow_validation, paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation, uaf_adversarial_detection). Diffs include trace.jsonl record additions, artifact_index.json hash updates, and `Finished test profile in X.XXs` timing fluctuations in stderr.txt.

* tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json — release-dossier counts re-derived against the new surface.

* tests/runtime_math/{admission_gate_report,controller_ablation_report,controller_manifest}.v1.json — runtime-math controller telemetry re-snapshotted; the host_resolve refactor changes a few admission-gate timings.

No source-of-truth bits change here — these are purely the auto-generated downstream reports catching up to the new ABI surface and refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
